Mojtaba's whereabouts remain unclear, while senior officials have been targeted, raising concerns over regime stability. The conflict is spilling into Gulf states, rapidly reshaping the Middle East. Iran continues to block the Straits of Hormuz, hitting not only the energy sector but also disrupting global supply chains.

programme.title: Murder on the Menu - EP 3

programme.title: Connecting Earth and Sky - EP 10

Nanang was from Brebes and was naive and innocent, while Dhea was a trendy city girl. Ghea found a boarding house for Nanang, and they ended up living in the same neighborhood. As time goes on... Nanang always listens to Dhea's complaints about her life and her crush. Does Dhea realize that Nanang has feelings for her?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 137
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Miss Biduan I Love You Sekebon
programme.desc: Adrian (Elryan Carlen) is upset with Tifa (Ina Marika) for refusing to evict her house. Because of this, Tifa has to lose her job. Fortunately, Tifa meets a grandmother who offers her a job after helping her.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 591
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih always knew how to handle the horses at Burhan's ranch, Sandra's father. Bimo came to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which was riding and caring for horses. As soon as he got on the horse, Bimo fell off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated. Since Burhan noticed that Bimo and Asih knew each other, he asked Asih to train Bimo in horseback riding.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 137
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cinta Itu Harus Berjalan kalau Capek Duduk aja
programme.desc: Bara (Masaji Wijayanto) is a famous soccer player, he does not want to continue his grandmother's business of managing an inn. Yuna is a goat-herding village girl who is quick-tempered. When they meet because when Bara kicks the ball that causes Yuna's goats to run away.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 591
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MENJARING CINTA DI TAMBAK NILA
programme.desc: Since becoming poor, Nila (Yuniza Icha) lives with her grandfather and manages his fish farm. Reza (Naufal Samudra), a regular customer at Nila’s fish pond, is upset because she no longer wants to sell him her fish. However, Reza keeps trying to persuade her since they both need the money.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 86
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mba Pembersih Berkilau Aku Nyangkut Di Hatimu
programme.desc: Diva (Ika Diharjo) accidentally saw Andre (Christ Laurent) being hypnotized on the street, Diva and her mother finally brought Andre to her house even though the cat is kucingan with Mr. RT. It has been going on for several hours that the hypnosis does not disappear and makes Andre realize who he really is. Diva and her mother are getting dizzy, so they agree to give Andre the pseudonym Cecep.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 138
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Dangdut Kelaz Aku Kamu Paling Pas
programme.desc: Topan (Indra Brotolaras) goes to the village to look for his biological mother with a photo provided by his father. Topan then searches for a dangdut studio, which turns out to have a vocalist named Novia (Nabila Zavira). Novia initially rejects Topan's presence, thinking that city boys don't like dangdut music. But all of that was disproved by Topan's earnestness when learning dangdut music.

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 11

programme.title: NoYa - EP 7

programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Rumah No 107 - EP 9
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai bersama keluarga Tok K, Joey, Man, Ropie & Bibik Cha. Saksikan telatah lucu mereka bersama tetamu undangan dan cameo yang bakal mengejutkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Lawak Tak Lagho - EP 3
programme.desc: Istimewa bersama pakar motivasi Samsul Debat dan barisan pelawak, saksikan mereka berkongsi kisah menarik dan lucu bersama penonton.

programme.title: Boss Kira - EP 6
programme.desc: Roy Azman, Syafa, & Haiqal, berentap sesama sendiri untuk mendapatkan hadiah lumayan dengan syarat, perlu bermain & meneka samada berat, tinggi, panjang, & harga objek di hadapan mereka.

programme.title: Muka Buku Raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah pertunjukan permainan meneka, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa Muka Buku Sebenar

programme.title: Mechamato Movie
programme.desc: Apabila sebuah kapal angkasa misteri terhempas ke Bumi, seorang pemuda terjumpa robot yang berkuasa bernama Machabot. Tanpa pengetahuan pemuda itu, Mechabot diburu makhluk angkasa sibernetik, Grakakus.

programme.title: Tak Kot Raya - EP 1
programme.desc: Tak Kot Edisi Raya, mempersembahkan selebriti tanah air berhadapan dengan cabaran dalam pelbagai permainan dan misi sambil melakukan aksi berani.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 8
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 5

programme.desc: Bersama hos, Dato' AC Mizal saksikan barisan pelawak, selebriti dan influencer membuat barisan juri misteri ketawa dalam masa 90 saat! Mampukah mereka meraih wang tunai sebagai mata ganjaran?

programme.title: Dapur Bapak Bapak - EP 5
programme.desc: Dapur Bapak Bapak menghimpunkan Datuk Chef Wan, Dato’ Ramli MS dan Dato’ Jalaluddin Hassan yang berkongsi hidangan tradisi penuh rasa dan cerita di sebalik sajian.

programme.title: Muzikal Lawak Superstar Unplugged - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Lawak S3 - EP 5

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 14
programme.desc: Mariana masih merindui kenangan lama bersama Luqman dan terus membuat perancangan supaya dia dapat bersama dengan Liuqman. Luqman cemburu dengan keakraban Qistina dan ibunya.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 30
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja - EP 3
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Syed Arif dan Farhah tanpa bersulam cinta mengundang pelbagai konflik. Ketika hubungan mula serasi, Syed Arif bertemu semula dengan kekasih lamanya, Katrina yang rupanya adik kepada Farhah.

programme.title: Pengantin Lelaki Untuk Cik Gadis - EP 1
programme.desc: Pertemuan Kris dan Salsa bermula ketika Kris membawa diri pulang ke kampung Tok Abah. Salsa kini menghadapi tuduhan pecah amanah.

programme.title: Ratu Ten Pin - EP 9
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang 3 remaja wanita dari latarbelakang keluarga yang berbeza mengejar gelaran Ratu Tenpin Negara.

programme.title: Siapa Jaga Mak? - EP 7
programme.desc: Diilhamkan oleh kisah-kisah pengasuh yang benar, Siapa Jaga Mak ceritakan tentang empat keluarga yang menghadapi pelbagai emosi daripada penjagaan orang tua.

programme.title: Asmara Beijing
programme.desc: Dira bercuti ke Beijing bersama kawannya, Shima untuk menenangkan fikiran selepas putus cinta dengan Rizal. Ketika di Beijing, Salina bertemu bekas kekasihnya, Imran.

programme.title: Pernikahan Palsu - EP 9
programme.desc: Sehari sebelum hari perkahwinannya dengan Aji, Nila mengalami kemalangan dan hilang penglihatan. Aji membatalkan perkahwinan itu. Galang yang tidak sanggup melihat Nila, terdesak untuk melamar Nila.

programme.title: Harta Dalam Stor - EP 9
programme.desc: Ikuti hos Nabil Mahir dan Azhar Sulaiman menerjah stor kediaman selebriti tanahair untuk mencari barang-barang yang boleh digunapakai dan dijual.

programme.title: Kak Kek & Abe Mmasok - EP 2
programme.desc: Siapa yang rindu dengan celoteh Kak Kek boleh tengok Kak Kek dalam rancangan terbarunya, Kak Kek & Abe Mmasok!

programme.title: 3 Gadis Manis - EP 4
programme.desc: 3 Gadis Manis sebuah drama mini bersiri digital eksklusif dari Gempak yang mengangkat tema persahabatan.

programme.title: No Filter - EP 3
programme.desc: Saksikan Kamal Adli sebagai hos membawa selebriti bercuti bersama peminatnya dalam Curi-Curi Cuti di bawah kempen #expeRIAnce.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 14
programme.desc: Mariana masih merindui kenangan lama bersama Luqman dan terus membuat perancangan supaya dia dapat bersama dengan Liuqman. Luqman cemburu dengan keakraban Qistina dan ibunya.

programme.title: First Wives - EP 8

programme.title: Di Balik Idola - EP 11

programme.title: Konsert Yang Paling Padu - EP 8

programme.title: The Lucky Bini Show - EP 26
programme.desc: Fahmi dan Husna merupakan jiran yang tinggal bersebelahan rumah. Fahmi seorang yang lurus dan tidak mempunyai perwatakan yang menarik akhirnya mampu berubah menjadi seorang "superstar" dan memikat hati Hus

programme.title: Beriyani Gam Kak Aspalela - EP 5

programme.title: Scammer Geng Marhaban - EP 8
programme.desc: Fifah tidak setuju dengan rancangan Maya untuk menipu Mami Sherry. Adib dan Aidil hormati keputusan Fifah tetapi mereka tetap mahu teruskan rancangan itu demi bersihkan kembali nama Hjh Quyah.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 15
programme.desc: Diana masih tidak berpuas hati dengan keputusan ibunya yang telah mengikut telunjuk Amanda. Ada bukti baru daripada Luqman yang bakal muncul yang mungkin akan membahayakan Aniq.

programme.title: Dalang Prank - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan hiburan prank yang melibatkan artis dan peserta yang menjadi dalang kepada prank masing-masing. Prank yang disukai oleh penonton akan dinobatkan Juara Dalang Prank.

programme.title: Mat Dan Kaki Jalan - EP 3

programme.title: Pulau
programme.desc: Sekumpulan kawan yang sedang bercuti mengalami mimpi ngeri tatkala kalah pertaruhan dan mereka terpaksa bermalam di pulau terasing. Di situ, mereka bertembung dengan roh-roh ganas yang terperangkap.

programme.title: Tersuka Tanpa Sengaja - EP 4

programme.desc: Born into a humble & rustic background troubled by familial & financial concerns, Anandhi takes it upon herself to leave home & fearlessly pursue a better life for her family. Watch her bravely face the odds of life with unwavering spirit.

programme.title: Ethirneechal Thodargiradhu
programme.desc: Urged by her father, Janani is always a high achiever. But her marriage into a patriarchal family dashes her dream of a career. Thus begins Janani's arduous journey towards empowering her family's oppressed women to unleash their power.

programme.title: Malli
programme.desc: Things take a momentous shift when a bold & loving village girl, Malli, crosses paths with a doting father and his 6-year-old daughter who yearns for a mother's love. Join the family's journey through the nuances of love, affection & parenthood.

programme.title: Anandaragam - Serial

programme.title: Iru Malargal
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: Aadukalam
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie - Kuttypuli

programme.desc: Landscapes, reflections, the velvety depth of the night... The artist Malgorzata Paszko talks about her themes, her technique, her research.

programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Interieurs - EP 6
programme.desc: Anne-Catherine Verwaerde investigates the difference between Mediterranean and Atlantic influences in decoration.

programme.title: Pistes Vertes
programme.desc: In Normandy, people from different backgrounds are committed to the environmental cause. They have one thing in common: they started by applying a few small ecological gestures in their daily lives before going further, until making it their profession.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: L'actu
programme.desc: The televised news programme from TVMonaco.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rts
programme.desc: All the news from RTS.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (8 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Allons-Y Franco !

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 5
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Yetili - EP 6
programme.desc: Nina and Leon, two little mice, live in a bookshop whose mascot is a large yeti cuddly toy called Yetili. Each evening, once the bookshop has closed, Yetili comes to life and settles his two friends on his knees to read them a story.

programme.title: Bestioles En Questions - EP 28
programme.desc: As a nature enthusiast, emilie is very interested in the behaviour of insects and other small creatures. What do ants eat? Why are frogs slimy? Can a tortoise catch a cold? No question goes unasked!

programme.title: Les Metiers - EP 33
programme.desc: To gain a better understanding of some professions, school children explain jobs to their parents in their own words.

programme.title: Ta Vie Sans Ca - EP 19
programme.desc: What would life be like without our most everyday objects? Each episode puts a different one in the spotlight. Whether a tap, an umbrella or a toothbrush, they all have a story to tell about their invention and subsequent evolution.

programme.title: La Clef - C'est Quoi Ton Truc Julie ? - EP 4
programme.desc: Julie Provencher is a mother passionate about education. With her, it's impossible to get bored! In each episode, she gives tips and tricks to parents so they can educate their children while having fun.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 23
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Partie De Campagne - EP 24
programme.desc: Surrounded by fields, near a vast forest and a pretty stream, lies the village of Bellefontaine. It's home to the fun-loving gang of friends Raphael, Lina, P'tit Pied and Grande Perche. Bubbling over with imagination, they fill every day with exciting adventures.

programme.title: Les Triples - EP 26
programme.desc: The triplets may look like angels, but they're not the last to get up to mischief... The two brothers and the sister are inseparable and as loving as they are mischievous. The adults need to be brave to channel their energy!

programme.title: Potobot - EP 7
programme.desc: Twelve year-old Chloe is feeling somewhat disillusioned. Then Potobot, a little robot arrives from the future with a mission for her: to change the world and make the future a better place. There's no doubt about it, working together, one step after another, the two of them can move mountains!

programme.title: L'aventure Du Monde Des Mondes - EP 17
programme.desc: Dimitri, Raph's and Anais's uncle, is a French globetrotter who is fascinated by nature. He gives them tasks to stimulate their creativity. Thanks to Blox, a small robot, they access the ''world of the worlds'', a secret fantasy place where they can play and learn.

programme.title: Roi Keita - EP 3
programme.desc: The entire empire is on alert: Soundiata Keita's mother has been kidnapped. Abdul, as thirsty for power as ever, heads to the city of the sacred baobab trees.

programme.title: Ma Vie Avec L'ia - EP 8
programme.desc: Theo, a teenager, questions artificial intelligence directly to try to understand it better. He wants to know what it is made of, what feeds it, and how it analyzes data.

programme.title: Falo
programme.desc: A news magazine show, ''Falo'' discusses and analyses current affairs in depth.

programme.title: Objectif Monde L'hebdo - EP 23
programme.desc: Using cloning, genetics and cross-breeding, researchers are trying to revive mammoths, wolves and other extinct species. A spectacular scientific quest that combines ecological hope and ethical controversy.

programme.title: Ding Dong : Montre-Moi Ta Maison ! - EP 12
programme.desc: We start the show with a steampunk enthusiast. Then we change scenery and atmosphere and visit a house in the Kloten cemetery.

programme.title: Le Magazine De La Riviera
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: Suisse En Scene
programme.desc: Interview with a key figure from the Swiss cultural scene. An opportunity to look back at their life and career, and the foundations that underpin their work.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 14
programme.desc: Former professional wrestler, Rakesh Jain arrives in France with a special sports visa. Seduced by Paris and French culture, he quickly learns the language and becomes a yoga trainer in prestigious centers. An opportunity to illustrate the inspiring fusion of French and Indian cultures.

programme.title: Le Match Dans Le Match - EP 79
programme.desc: We welcome a recently retired cyclist: the Dane Jakob Fuglsang looks back on his career, which he ended a few weeks ago.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Generation F
programme.desc: Fashion, gastronomy, sports, urban cultures, lifestyle... The artist Richard Orlinski explores the ''French touch''. Between Dakar, London and Montreal, he meets the new generation of French-speaking creators and highlights an uninhibited, creative, bold Francophonie.

programme.title: Hep Taxi !
programme.desc: In town or in the countryside, day or night, Jerome Colin, the presenter-taxi driver leads his prestigious customer on a four-wheel journey conducive to secrets.

programme.title: Refuges De Montagne - Hiver - EP 3
programme.desc: The restrictions imposed by Covid-19 are also complicating life at the refuges. For Ursula and Ruedi, last minute cancellations are problematic. At the Brunni, it's decision time to sell off excess provisions and limit staff costs. Nicole and Turi Naue have to complete the work at the Trift.

programme.title: Terra Artistika - EP 10
programme.desc: ''Painting is first and foremost a place of work.'' A painter of abstraction, Anne Slacik has spent twenty-five years developing her work, always closely connected to contemporary poetry. Encounter...

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 22
programme.desc: An in-depth look at Chopard and Goossens, jewellers, and their exceptional expertise. Above all, jewellery is a dream, often made in gold. The exquisite Chanel exhibition. The history of the watch and of Richard, gold and silversmith. Parisian jewellery of tomorrow, available today from Persta, Sister Morphine and Karl Mazlo.

programme.title: Version Francaise - EP 24
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: Questions Pour Un Champion
programme.desc: A general knowledge quiz.

programme.title: Savourer - EP 12
programme.desc: On the menu: crab croquettes, shepherd's pie croquettes, fridge-clear-out polenta croquettes, Asian-style salmon croquettes.

programme.title: Parlons Eco - EP 6
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's new economic news bulletin, presented by Vicky Bogaert. ''Parlons eco'' analyses today's major trends and interviews the men and women who are starting businesses, innovating and imagining the economy of tomorrow.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Gims A Paris La Defense Arena : Le Concert Evenement
programme.desc: A rain of hits and an extraordinary stage design! The artist, who has sold eight million albums, streamed more than ever and showered with awards, raises his voice before an enthralled audience. From "Bella" to "Ciel", here is Gims, at the centre of the immense arena, delivering a spectacular and unifying performance.

programme.title: Meurtres A Amiens
programme.desc: On a canal amidst the ''hortillonnages'', the floating market gardens of Amiens, a lifeless body is found in a Nautilus-shaped fun-fair gondola. Inspector Monet and his assistant Barnier head the investigation. The victim, a seemingly ordinary woman, was apparently threatened ambitious plans for a Jules Verne theme park.

programme.title: Arts Unveiled
programme.desc: After the fall of the Berlin Wall in 1989, Germany faced a historic question: Where should its capital be located? Should it remain in Bonn, the quiet postwar seat of government, or return to Berlin, a city that had experienced empires, dictatorships, and division? In 1991, the German Bundestag voted on the capital, which would also become the symbolic heart of a reunified Germany.

programme.title: Movie - Unakkum Enakkum
programme.desc: A young man leaves his luxurious life to prove to his lover's brother that he is not a spoilt rich brat. He works hard and lives like a farmer till the next harvest, and wins everyone's heart.

programme.title: Movie - Charlie Chaplin

programme.title: Movie - Neethikku Thandanai

programme.title: Movie - En Purushan Ethir Veetu Ponnu
programme.desc: Pandi is happily married to his uncle's daughter. But misunderstandings creep into their relationship when his wife suspects him of having an affair.

programme.desc: Mohan's father wants him to marry Menaka, but Mohan likes Kalyani. His father gives in to his demands, but Menaka has other plans.

programme.title: CLASSIC MATCH
programme.desc: We delve into the Premier League archive to bring you a Classic Match from the 2014/2015 season.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 39
programme.desc: Fresh from lifting the Africa Cup of Nations trophy with Senegal, Iliman Ndiaye reflects on a journey defined by resilience, imagination and quiet determination. From the academy pitches of France to the unforgiving grounds of non-league Boreham Wood, and on to the bright lights of the Premier League with Everton, we trace a rise that defied convention and expectation at every turn.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 31
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - EP 30
programme.desc: Fast-paced with music, ISO angles, and commentary, Netbusters offers an alternative review of every goal and key moment from the latest round of Premier League fixtures.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 24
programme.desc: Harry Wilson is having the season of his career, and is one of the league leaders in direct goal involvements. Now in his fourth season at Fulham, the midfielder is on pace to set career highs in both goals and assists this term. This week, the Wales international sits down with the Big Interview to discuss his prolific form and his journey to the Premier League.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 32
programme.desc: Sunderland have been one of the stories of the Premier League season so far, and at the heart of the Black Cats' remarkable return to the English top flight is Granit Xhaka. This week, The Big Interview sits down with the Swiss international to reflect on an impressive season at the Stadium of Light and life in the North East.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: THE CATCH-UP SHOW - EP 31
programme.desc: The Catch-Up Show is your chance to relive the 'best bits' from across the Premier League week with a compilation of all PLP content and programming.

programme.title: PL RIVALRIES - EP 1
programme.desc: Rivalries don't get much bigger than Sunderland v Newcastle. With the Wear-Tyne derby around the corner, Sunderland legend Kevin Phillips and former Newcastle goalkeeper Shay Given sit down to discuss why this game matters so much and to talk through their top ten moments from the derby over the years.

programme.desc: Rivalries don't get much bigger than Sunderland v Newcastle. programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Tshilumba Mikixi vs. August Kayambala
programme.desc: In this episode Tshilomba 'The Old Monkey' Mikixi takes on August 'The Barista' Kayambala in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Joe Calzaghe vs Roy Jones Jr.
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a light heavyweight championship match between Joe Calzaghe (45-0, 32 KOs) and Roy Jones Jr. (52-4, 38 KOs) from Madison Square Garden in New York City, New York, USA, on November 8, 2008.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude at the Port of Los Angeles in San Pedro, Cal., before the historic battleship USS Iowa, where a very special all active duty and retired military members tackle such obstacles as the Log Runner and I Beam Cross.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Travis Walker vs. Chris Arreola
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a battle among heavyweights as Travis Walker faces the then-undefeated Chris Arreola, who was ranked in the top 10 by four of the boxing organizations. While the fight seems to go to one side after the opening bell, the momentum quickly shifts.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Shodai, Takakeisho, Ryuden and Aoiyama from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 7: Mexico City, Mexico - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Boxing and the Martial Art of Hands with Masters Igancio Nacho" Beristain and Tiburcio Garcia."

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Tshilumba Mikixi vs. August Kayambala
programme.desc: In this episode Tshilomba 'The Old Monkey' Mikixi takes on August 'The Barista' Kayambala in a lightweight clash.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Sergio Martinez vs. Paul Williams I
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features middleweights Sergio 'Maravilla' Martinez (44-1, 24 KOs) vs. Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (37-1, 27 KOs) from Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on December 5, 2009. The result was a controversial majority decision, and the two would eventually square off in a rematch about a year later.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Juan Manuel Marquez vs. Michael Katsidis
programme.desc: This episode features lightweight champion Juan Manuel Marquez defending against Michael Katsidis, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Hohhot Grand Prix, and stop to get to know the world's #1 ranked fighter Aleksandar Kukolj. We then head to Russia to witness the effect that Judo has on the Russian people.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Keith Thurman vs Orlando Lora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is the undefeated Keith Thurman facing off with Orlando Lora. A left hook and right uppercut combination ends this fight. Also on the card, action from former heavyweight champion James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Mitakeumi, Goeido, Okinoumi and Takakeisho from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: FS MMA Mario Rinaldi vs. Mark Burch
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mario Rinaldi looks to extend his winning streak against Mark Burch in this rematch which takes place in beautiful Costa Rica.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Weapons as well as Girl's Forms and Team Demo highlights.

programme.title: FS MMA Mario Rinaldi vs. Mark Burch
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Mario Rinaldi looks to extend his winning streak against Mark Burch in this rematch which takes place in beautiful Costa Rica.

programme.title: WCCB Tim Tszyu vs. Sebastian Fundora
programme.desc: From the T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas, undefeated Super Welterweight World Champion Tim Tszyu travels from Australia to defend his title against former World Champion Sebastian Fundora. Fundora stands 6'5", and is known for his all-action and exciting style. He replaces an injured Keith Thurman, and jumps into a World Title match-up against one of boxing's rising stars in Tszyu.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 5: Marseille, France - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Savate and the Martial Art of Hands and Feet with Masters Christian Robert, Frank May, Frederic Baret, Laurent Bois and Patrick Gellat.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Sergio Mora
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing off with Sergio Mora with a highly disputed and controversial decision you will have to see to believe! The two never had a rematch. Also on the card, action from WBC Super Welterweight champ Jermell Charlo.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 1 featuring Kakuryu, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Koteoko from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Canelo Alvarez vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: This episode features then-WBC silver light middleweight champion Saul (Canelo) Alvarez looking to give Carlos Baldomir his first career KO loss, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features ring girl Arianny Celeste making a high schooler's dreams come true when she goes as his date to his prom. programme.desc: Mojo and Bo only wanted to help fix a satellite dish with Mojo's chopper top. Now they've been mistaken for a UFO, and the whole town is in a tizzy about invading aliens!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 13

programme.desc: Phoebe and her friends are enjoying a Pop Paper City winter wonderland! But can Phoebe help to make a snowman before a snowstorm arrives?

programme.title: Dog Loves Books (S1) - EP 17
programme.desc: Dog and Pug go on an adventure where they shrink to the size of little insects. They meet Granny Pug who is searching for a very rare Butterfly.

programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy monster is just about to take a bite out of his delicious green sock for breakfast, but before he can it gets blown away! He goes to OKIDO to find out why the wind is so blowy.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Messy, a monster, explores science questions that children ask about the world around us. Messy finds a very dusty sock underneath his bed, but why does it make him teary? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Betty the ice cream van is so full of ice cream that it's making her speed around town out of control. It's up to Mojo and Bo with the racer top to stop her and save those treats!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: When JoJo can't find her favourite Captain Chloe storybook, Gran Gran suggests they make up their own story.

programme.desc: Sarah's hair keeps getting in her way, so it's time for a trip to the hairdressers.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: When Bingo stops playing Bluey's spy game, their grown-up controlling device stops working properly! Bluey now sees how important Bingo is and needs to win her back!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 14
programme.desc: Forced to wait five minutes in front of a restaurant for their takeaway, Bluey and Bingo become restless for entertainment, pushing the very limits of Dad's patience.

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 15
programme.desc: Playing 'Butterflies' in the backyard is great fun, until Bluey runs away with Judo leaving Bingo all alone. Now poor Bingo's heartbroken and Bluey needs to make amends.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Evil Pea takes over the Tato Tower HQ and uses Carrot's new security system to keep Supertato out. Supertato and Carrot work on a cunning ice cream plan to sneak back in.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S3) - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in!

programme.desc: Norrie skips into the Clubhouse and greets her friends. As they greet her, they reminisce about when they first met.

programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save the world's stinkiest plant from becoming Glitch's latest perfume?

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Xuli finds a shipwreck on a coral reef and learns some glitches don't need to be fixed.

programme.title: My World Kitchen (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Naima is cooking a special Algerian Borek. Borek is made from pastry, mashed potato, meat, cheese and you can even add olives. She can't wait for her friends to taste it!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 12

programme.title: The Toys That Built The World (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: For six decades two silly but savvy entrepreneurs-S.S. Adams and H. Fishlove-turned their love of a good joke into a booming prank toy industry. Their rivalry produced hundreds of tricks and gags.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S12) - EP 1
programme.desc: After last year's devastating flood in the garden shaft, Rick, Marty and the fellowship return to Oak Island with renewed confidence and immediately discover a never-before-known shaft.

programme.desc: After last year's devastating flood in the garden shaft, Rick, Marty and the fellowship return to Oak Island with renewed confidence and immediately discover a never-before-known shaft.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 4

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 4
programme.desc: A young father and his family come under attack at a busy drive-thru. Terrified of his aggravated assailant, he fires his gun and allegedly injures an innocent bystander.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 1

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 5

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 6
programme.desc: A 52-year-old VP of a medical center faces 95 years in prison for fatally stabbing a doctor's husband. He insists he was trapped by a man intent on harming him and forced to defend himself.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 1

programme.title: Donal's Feasts: Fasts and Festivals (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Episode One sees Donal visit Hare Krishna Island in Lough Erne for a festival, where food offerings to the deities are central to the celebrations.

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House New Home (S6) - EP 1
programme.desc: George takes on a 16th-century listed Cotswold cottage with some nasty surprises. There's also a Kent Coast house needing a super cool bedroom for an eight-year-old.

programme.title: The Great South African Bake Off (S4) - EP 5
programme.desc: It's spice week in the Bake Off Tent. For the first challenge, the bakers have to make spiced tarts. One of the most challenging technical bakes of the season sees the bakers attempt steamed ginger puddings and the showstopper requires the bakers to make baklava, complete with their own phyllo pastry.

programme.title: Guillaume's Paris (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Guillaume Brahimi explores the 11th and 12th arrondissements of Paris; Guillaume visits the chocolate factory of Alain Ducasse.

programme.title: Jamie's Air Fryer Meals (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jamie cooks prosciutto-baked fish, followed by cheese and chive scones, then a whole roast chicken curry and crispy pork noodles. Jamie invites his chef-friend Poppy Cooks to show us a potato dish, then he whips up an air-fried peach Alaska.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and her crack team help a farming family transform their family home.

programme.title: Your Home, Made Perfect (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Jeremy and Paula fell in love with a 19th-century house, complete with a dream conservatory in Halifax. Now, the home where they raised their family has become a pain.

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals (S6) - EP 2
programme.desc: The five remaining teams create 24 reimagined tarts and 24 peach melbas, before attempting a pièce montée of 160 individual choux buns, inspired by a Mad Science theme.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33) - EP 21
programme.desc: Graham Norton welcomes the biggest stars of film, TV and music on to his sofa for chat, performances and comedy.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out (S3) - EP 2
programme.desc: Stacey Solomon and her crack team help a farming family transform their family home.

programme.title: The Great South African Bake Off (S4) - EP 6
programme.desc: This week on The Great South African Bake off, the bakers are celebrating vegetables through a range of delicious challenges. Siba and Paul task them with vegetarian galettes, a traditional Turkish flatbread, and vegetable showstoppers.

programme.desc: Jeremy and Paula fell in love with a 19th-century house, complete with a dream conservatory in Halifax. Now, the home where they raised their family has become a pain.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan turn their attention to the great outdoors as they aim to tackle the garden. The best pals seek help from gardening oracle Warrie Price.

programme.title: Amanda and Alan's Italian Job (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Alan takes charge of tackling the first bedroom, and he doesn't hold back with his design. Inspired by the romance and history of his favourite city, Florence, he's determined to have a mural.

programme.title: Grand Designs (S24) - EP 2
programme.desc: Ordering a factory-built house was a no-brainer for manufacturing maestro Pete. But, in true self-building style, even a near-finished project brings challenges like a bat out of hell.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Seasons (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jamie celebrates rhubarb in a lip-smacking sauce, heroes spinach in a silky goat's cheese risotto and marries vibrant basil with chard in a crowd-pleasing cheesy spring cannelloni

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jason's debut in Dubai is all things spice as he explores a traditional souk in the old town, shows us how to spice up our lives, and is joined by local chef Rahul Rana.

programme.title: Guillaume's Paris (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Guillaume Brahimi explores the 11th and 12th arrondissements of Paris; Guillaume visits the chocolate factory of Alain Ducasse.

programme.title: Rick Stein's Food Stories (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Rick meets inventor James Dyson on his futuristic Lincolnshire farm, where robots help grow strawberries all year round. With some superb local sausages, he makes bangers and mash.

programme.title: Nisha Katona's Home Kitchen (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Nisha is making a meatball curry, an Indian chai tea and a Mayan chilli hot chocolate and tandoori chops with turmeric chips, as well as a great veggie kebab option too.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out (S3) - EP 4
programme.desc: Stacey and her crack team help single mum Claire and her five boys transform their home.

programme.title: Donal's Feasts: Fasts and Festivals (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: In episode two, Donal joins a Muslim family who are fasting during Ramadan, explores the traditions of the Romanian Orthodox Community as he prepares a traditional Easter meal and joins in the joyous atmosphere of Diwali, the Festival of Lights, as he celebrates and feasts with a Hindu family in their home.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: Jason explores accessible luxury on Palm Jumeirah - one of the most glamorous areas of the city - and Ranvir Singh meets the highly-rated chef Himanshu Saini.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S2) - EP 2
programme.desc: Jason goes back to the roots of Dubai as he explores the diverse Dubai Creek, and Ranvir Singh investigates one of Dubai's most time-honoured traditions of pearl diving.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S2) - EP 3
programme.desc: Jason goes green by cooking up dishes using leftovers that are not only sumptuous but also sustainable, and Ranvir Singh gets a glimpse into the future of food.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S2) - EP 4
programme.desc: Jason visits Dubai's Old Town to get fully immersed in the local culture and cuisine, and Ranvir is out and about as she discovers the importance of Dubai's fragrances.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes (S2) - EP 5
programme.desc: Jason is on the beach in the coastal area of Jumeirah to delve into the art of pickling.

programme.title: Nisha Katona's Home Kitchen (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Nisha is making a meatball curry, an Indian chai tea and a Mayan chilli hot chocolate and tandoori chops with turmeric chips, as well as a great veggie kebab option too.

programme.title: Donal's Real Time Recipes (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: To kick off the series, Donal shares his love for a real family favourite - pasta! Using simple tips and flavour hacks, Donal shows us four new ways to prepare pasta.

programme.title: Eva Pau's Asian Kitchen (S1) - EP 1

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby (S5) - EP 2
programme.desc: Monica and Rob visit a paradise island in the Maldives. Working behind the scenes, they discover the intricate operation required to deliver a five-star service

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals (S6) - EP 3
programme.desc: It's chocolate week and the four remaining teams take on chocolate-domed figurines and totally-nuts desserts, before creating archaeology-themed chocolate bars.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show (S33) - EP 1
programme.desc: Graham Norton presents a lively chat show featuring Dwayne Johnson, Emily Blunt, Matthew McConaughey, James Norton and RAYE.

programme.title: Next Level Chef UK (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: Only seven chefs remain in the competition, and this time it's all about fusion cooking, where they'll be dealing with two types of cuisine and a surprise guest...

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 1
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: Halftime Report - EP 2
programme.desc: Halftime Report is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC’s Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC’s "The Exchange" is the newsroom-based program for today’s Investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 2
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 1
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: Fast Money - EP 2
programme.desc: "Fast Money" is America’s post-market show. Hosted by Melissa Lee and a roundtable of top traders, "Fast Money" breaks through the noise of the day, to bring you the actionable news that matters most to investors.

programme.title: U.S. Markets Edition - EP 44
programme.desc: U.S. Markets Edition delivers key takeaways from the most impactful interviews and insights from CNBC’s programming in the US. As global markets become more interconnected, this program ensures audiences in Asia stay informed on major developments shaping the business world overnight.

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 1
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: Squawk Box Asia - EP 2
programme.desc: Squawk Box Asia is CNBC’s flagship show that sets the news agenda and takes viewers through the pre-game and the opening of Asia’s business trading day, covering the top market moving stories and views from the top CEOs, asset managers and newsmakers

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 1
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: The China Connection - EP 2
programme.desc: The China Connection delivers in-depth analysis of China’s economy, markets and its relationship with the global landscape. Emily Chan brings you expert insights, exclusive interviews, covering key sectors, trade developments and policy shifts.

programme.title: Inside India - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s Inside India gives you news and market commentary on the emerging powerhouse, businesses and people behind its rise. Inside India goes beyond the headlines to give you the edge and insights - this is your gateway to the India story.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: We travel the world to see how tradition, technology and human ingenuity can help reclaim the planet's precious water supply.

programme.title: An Optimist's Guide to the Planet S2 - EP 6
programme.desc: As we look toward the future and seek to overcome our world's climate challenges, people with imagination are showing the way.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How Chinese Brands Are Going Global
programme.desc: From Pop Mart's Labubus to Shein, Temu and Luckin, Chinese brands have become global consumer favorites and cultural ambassadors. With much of the credit going to TikTok, shoppers are hungry for more.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: The Hospitals That Won't Let Patients Go Home
programme.desc: The International Finance Corp., an arm of the World Bank, spends millions of dollars of taxpayer money to build up private-sector services in the developing world.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Trading Guru and His Money-Losing Disciples
programme.desc: IM Academy was a global phenomenon, claiming it could make anyone a top trader. Its founder, Chris Terry, a self-made trader turned multimillionaire who flaunted luxury cars, private jets and apartments across continents.

programme.title: China's Controversial $167 Billion Mega-Dam
programme.desc: In one of the most earthquake-prone regions on Earth, where the Tibetan Plateau meets the Himalayas, China is building a colossal hydropower system, pushing engineering and geopolitics to the limit.

programme.title: Who Will Fill Jamie Dimon's Shoes?
programme.desc: With a $4.6 trillion balance sheet, JPMorgan is more valuable than its three biggest rivals combined. And much of the bank’s success is arguably due to its long-time leader, Jamie Dimon.

programme.title: The Rise of America's ICE Towns
programme.desc: Small towns are at the center of President Donald Trump's mass deportation campaign, spearheaded by ICE. In one rural New Mexico county, officials are grappling with what it means to be an ICE town.

programme.title: Sex-for-Work Claims in West Africa's Rubber Industry
programme.desc: An activist seeking to address the alleged abuses contends she has been targeted with litigation to keep her quiet, which the company denied.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hannah Fry visits South Korea to explore how it became a cultural and tech superpower. She trains with a Taekwondo blackbelt, learns kimchi secrets from a grandmaster and dives into pro gaming.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei

programme.title: Global Watch

programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Special Drama "A Novelist's Diary"
programme.desc: The bestselling mystery novelist Serizawa Kan (Itao Itsuji) has died. Eto Megumi (Kaho), who had long hoped to become his editor, learns from his wife, Serizawa Mariko (Sylvia Grab), that he left behind a diary. To her surprise, it contains warm, intimate entries unlike anything in his writing - passages secretly added by Mariko, revealing her hidden feelings for her late husband. Desperate in her faltering career, Megumi makes Mariko a proposal that crosses the line of editorial ethics.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 10 (R)
programme.desc: Nobunaga finally conquers Mino, and Hanbei becomes a retainer of Tokichiro. Meanwhile, Akechi Mitsuhide (Kaname Jun) visits Nobunaga as an envoy of Ashikaga Yoshiaki, asking him to defeat the Miyoshi clan, who killed the previous shogun, and escort Yoshiaki to Kyoto to install him as the next shogun. Nobunaga accepts the request and marries his sister Ichi to Azai Nagamasa (Nakajima Ayumu) to secure peace, as Nagamasa could obstruct his march to the capital.

programme.desc: A local supermarket specialising in seafood closes after nearly 50 years - to keep its legacy alive, the founder teams up with a supermarket chain. Can it survive amidst fierce competition?

programme.title: Xiaomai's Health Notes
programme.desc: This as your health as the number 1 , all the 0 followed afterwards are all yours! But without health, without the number1, no matter how many 0 are added afterwards, it is still 0. How to avoid getting sick? How to get sick less frequently? How to recover faster? How to maintain a healthy life? "Xiaomai's Health Notes" specially collected all the easiest, most practical, cheapest and most efficient ways for all of you. A good day starts with "Xiaomai's Health Notes".

programme.title: 2026 New Taipei City Wan Jin Shi Marathon
programme.desc: The 2026 New Taipei City Wan Jin Shi Marathon will take place on March 15! As Taiwan's first road race to earn the World Athletics "Gold Label" certification, this event starts from Wanli and winds along the breathtaking North Coast toward Jinshan. Combining stunning ocean views with challenging terrain, it is hailed by runners as "Taiwan's Most Beautiful Coastal Marathon.

programme.title: Woori The Virgin - EP 1
programme.desc: Oh Woori (Im Soo Hyang) vowed to remain a virgin until she marries, and has shied away from romantic relationships in a bid to remain chaste. A terrible mixup takes place during her routine checkup and she is accidentally artificially inseminated!

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 31

programme.title: Good Partner - EP 5
programme.desc: The story follows popular divorce lawyer Cha Eun-Kyung (Jang Na-ra), who finds herself faced with her own marital crisis. She often clashes with rookie lawyer Han Yoo-Ri (Nam Ji-Hyun) over cases. A workplace battle between the two lawyers is about to unfold.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 15
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: No Return - EP 2
programme.desc: Mau-choi and Wai Ho meet Commander Tong’s minions at Kwai Heung Lau. They seemingly banter. Danger is everywhere as they actually probe each other. From some picture album, Fa-heung recognizes Wai Ho was her schoolmate who once saved her life. Kwai-sim’s older brother Tang Kwai-sun, aka Master Sun, and other bosses ask Kwai-sim to settle her debts, causing a bank run crisis.

programme.title: Gone With The Rain - EP 18
programme.desc: In the ancient Jing, a young Emperor has just ascended but the state is torn apart by a tumultuous rebellion. In this harsh world, Mo Xi (Zhang Nan), the niece of Official Bai, and her cousin Bai Feng Yao (Wang Yu Wen) team up to avoid a terrible fate.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 11
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: A Journey to Love - EP 12
programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: Heroes In White - EP 20
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Sai-hang kidnaps Wing-sum and Yee-ting. Sai-hang demands a ransom of HK$10 million from Wai-man and warns him not to call the police. Wai-man and Yin-cho go the exchange location with the ransom. But they only see Yee-ting. Yin-cho gets hurt as he has a fight with Sai-hang.

programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. programme.title: IDOL I - EP 1
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] A tale unfolds around star attorney Maeng Se Na (Choi Soo Young), once a devoted longtime fan herself, who steps up to defend her idol Do Ra Ik (Kim Jae Young) after he is falsely accused of murder, setting off a chain of events that follows.

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 2
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 2
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.title: Dear Enemy - EP 3
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Dear Enemy tells the story of two former college friends, Luo Man and Chen Kai Xi, who became bitter rivals after they reunite many years later. But through conflicts in both work and life, they eventually reconcile and grow together along the way.

programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.desc: The story revolves the top assassins from Wu nation and their diversly skilled six-member team embarking on a journey filled with challenges and crises.

programme.title: IDOL I - EP 2

programme.title: My Sweet Mobster - EP 3
programme.desc: Ex-gangster Seo Ji Hwan (Um Tae Goo) runs a company hiring ex-gang members to help reform their lives. Go Eun-Ha (Han Sun Hwa), a children's YouTube creator, accidentally injures him while working a part-time cleaning job. To her surprise, he recognizes her!

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 9
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 19
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 4
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 15
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 20
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 21
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 5
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 16
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 22
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 23
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 10
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Brick Slaves - EP 20
programme.desc: LAU YIU-MING (Vincent Wong) exhausts the money that he and his girlfriend have saved for many years to buy a property and is about to get married. Out of the blue, his girlfriend not only wants to break up with him, but also secretly leases the premises out to a piano teacher, CHOI KIN-CHING (Selena Li). Unfortunately, YIU-MING's bad day gets even worse as he is soon laid off from work.

This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung).
